hooks.command: jq -n --arg ctx "Context is about to be compacted for the pep_pricing_tool project. Before doing anything else this turn: 1) append a dated entry to Obsidian_pep_pricing_tool/log.md for any work this session not yet logged; 2) create or append Obsidian_pep_pricing_tool/sessions/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md summarizing today's work; 3) add any missing rows to Obsidian_pep_pricing_tool/index.md Sessions/Analyses tables. Follow the conventions already documented in CLAUDE.md and Obsidian_pep_pricing_tool/CLAUDE.md. Do this proactively without asking the user first, then commit and push the wiki files before continuing." '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreCompact",additionalContext:$ctx}}'
